SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class AbstractSMTTranslator

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.AbstractSMTTranslator
All Implemented Interfaces:
SMTTranslator
Direct Known Subclasses:
SmtLib2Translator
public abstract class AbstractSMTTranslator extends Object implements SMTTranslator
This abstract class provides a stub for translation of KeY-Formulas to other standards. Formulas are translated in a correct, but not always complete representation of the target standard. Non-first-order elements in a formula are translated as uninterpreted predicates. The translation for standards supporting multiple sorts is oriented on the paper "The Boogie 2 Type System: Design and Verification Condition Generation" by Leino and Ruemmer.

    • getTacletSetTranslation

    • translateProblem

      public final StringBuilder translateProblem(Sequent sequent, Services services, SMTSettings settings) throws IllegalFormulaException
      Description copied from interface: SMTTranslator
      Translates a problem into the given syntax. The only difference to translate(Term t, Services services) is that assumptions will be added.
      Specified by:
      translateProblem in interface SMTTranslator
      Parameters:
      sequent - the sequent to be translated.
      services -
      Returns:
      a representation of the term in the given syntax.
      Throws:
      IllegalFormulaException

    • getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation

      public Collection<Throwable> getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation()

    • getSettings

      protected final SMTSettings getSettings()

    • buildCompleteText

      protected abstract StringBuilder buildCompleteText(StringBuilder formula, ArrayList<StringBuilder> assum, ArrayList<de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.ContextualBlock> assumptionBlocks, ArrayList<ArrayList<StringBuilder>> functions, ArrayList<ArrayList<StringBuilder>> predicates, ArrayList<de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.ContextualBlock> predicateBlocks, ArrayList<StringBuilder> types, SortHierarchy sortHierarchy, SMTSettings settings)
      Build the text, that can be read by the final decider. If the assumptions should be added to the formula, add them like assumtions impliy formula.
      Parameters:
      formula - The formula, that was built out of the internal representation. It is built by ante implies succ.
      assum - Assumptions made in this logic. Set of formulas, that are assumed to be true.
      assumptionBlocks - List of ContextualBlocks, which refer to the position of different types of assumptions in the container assumptions. Use these objects to make detailed comments in the translations. For more information see the class ContextualBlock .
      functions - List of functions. Each Listelement is built up like (name | sort1 | ... | sortn | resultsort)
      predicates - List of predicates. Each Listelement is built up like (name | sort1 | ... | sortn)
      predicateBlocks - List of ContextualBlocks, which refer to the position of different types of predicate in the container predicates. Use these objects to make detailed comments in the translations. For more information see the class ContextualBlock .
      types - List of the used types.
      Returns:
      The StringBuilder that can be read by the decider

    • isMultiSorted

      protected abstract boolean isMultiSorted()
      Returns, whether the Structure, this translator creates should be a Structure, that is multi sorted. If false, a single sorted structure is created. Then all sorts are translated as integers.
      Returns:
      true, if multi sorted logic is supported.

    • getIntegerSort

      protected abstract StringBuilder getIntegerSort()
      The String used for integer values. This sort is also used in single sorted logics.
      Returns:
      The String used for integers.

    • getBoolSort

      protected abstract StringBuilder getBoolSort()
      The String used for boolean values.
      Returns:
      The string used for boolean values.

    • translateSort

      protected abstract StringBuilder translateSort(String name, boolean isIntVal)
      Translate a sort.
      Parameters:
      name - the sorts name
      isIntVal - true, if the sort should represent some kind of integer
      Returns:
      The String used for this sort. If Multisorted, used in declarations, else for the typepredicates.

    • translateIntegerValue

      protected StringBuilder translateIntegerValue(long val) throws IllegalFormulaException
      Translate a sort. Return the StringBuilder, that should be displayed at definitionpart. i.e. the name used for typepredicates an similair. Override this, if integers are supported.
      Returns:
      the sorts name
      Throws:
      IllegalFormulaException

    • translateLogicalIfThenElse

      protected abstract StringBuilder translateLogicalIfThenElse(StringBuilder cond, StringBuilder ifterm, StringBuilder elseterm)
      Translate the logical if_then_else construct. All attributes are logical formulas. If the underlying language does not support this contruct, it is equivalent with (cond IMPLIES ifterm) AND (NOT(cond) IMPLIES thenterm) and can be reduced to this.
      Parameters:
      cond - the condition term.
      ifterm - the formula used, if cond=true
      elseterm - the term used, if cond=false
      Returns:
      ther StringBuilder representing the if then else construct

    • translateTermIfThenElse

      protected StringBuilder translateTermIfThenElse(StringBuilder cond, StringBuilder ifterm, StringBuilder elseterm) throws IllegalFormulaException
      Translate the if_then_else construct for terms (i.e. ifterm and condterm are not of Sort FORMULA) If this method is nor overriden, a default implementation is used. This might me less effective than a language supported translation. So, if allowed by the target language, override this.
      Parameters:
      cond - the condition formula
      ifterm - the term used if cond = true.
      elseterm - the term used if cond = false.
      Returns:
      the StringBuilder representing the if then else construct.
      Throws:
      IllegalFormulaException - if this construct is not supported.

    • translateUniqueness

      protected StringBuilder translateUniqueness(AbstractSMTTranslator.FunctionWrapper function, Collection<AbstractSMTTranslator.FunctionWrapper> distinct, Services services) throws IllegalFormulaException
      Translates the unique-property of a function.
      Parameters:
      function - the function itself
      distinct - the set of functions, that should be distinct.
      Returns:
      the translation of the unique function
      Throws:
      IllegalFormulaException

    • buildInjectiveFunctionAssumption

      protected StringBuilder buildInjectiveFunctionAssumption(AbstractSMTTranslator.FunctionWrapper fw, Services services)

    • createGenericVariables

      protected ArrayList<StringBuilder> createGenericVariables(int count, int start)

      protected StringBuilder translateDistinct(AbstractSMTTranslator.FunctionWrapper[] functions, Services services)

    • translateLogicalAll

      protected StringBuilder translateLogicalAll(ArrayList<StringBuilder> variables, ArrayList<Sort> sorts, StringBuilder result, Services services)

    • translateLogicalAll

      protected StringBuilder translateLogicalAll(StringBuilder var, Sort sort, StringBuilder result, Services services)

    • translateTerm

      protected StringBuilder translateTerm(JTerm term, List<QuantifiableVariable> quantifiedVars, Services services) throws IllegalFormulaException
      Translates the given term into input syntax and adds the resulting string to the StringBuilder sb.
      Parameters:
      term - the Term which should be written in Simplify syntax
      quantifiedVars - a Vector containing all variables that have been bound in super-terms. It is only used for the translation of modulo terms, but must be looped through until we get there.
      Throws:
      IllegalFormulaException

    • getTypePredicate

      protected StringBuilder getTypePredicate(Sort s, StringBuilder arg)
      Get the type predicate for the given sort and the given expression.
      Parameters:
      s - The sort, the type predicate is wanted for.
      arg - The expression, whose type should be defined.
      Returns:
      The well formed type predicate expression.

    • translateUnknown

      protected final StringBuilder translateUnknown(JTerm term, List<QuantifiableVariable> quantifiedVars, Services services) throws IllegalFormulaException
      Takes care of sequent tree parts that were not matched in translate(term, skolemization). In this class it just produces a warning, nothing more. It is provided as a hook for subclasses.
      Parameters:
      term - The Term given to translate
      Throws:
      IllegalFormulaException

    • translateVariable

      protected final StringBuilder translateVariable(Operator op)

    • translateFunc

      protected final StringBuilder translateFunc(Operator o, ArrayList<StringBuilder> sub)
      translate a function.
      Parameters:
      o - the Operator used for this function.
      sub - The StringBuilders representing the arguments of this Function.
      Returns:
      a StringBuilder representing the complete Function.

    • translateBsumFunction

      protected final StringBuilder translateBsumFunction(JTerm bsumterm, ArrayList<StringBuilder> sub)
      translate a bsum function. Alos add the created functionsymbol created depending on the term.
      Parameters:
      bsumterm - The term used as third argument of the bsum function.
      sub - The two terms used as first and second argument of the bsum operator.
      Returns:

      sub - The two terms used as first and second argument of the bsum operator.
